evidence.voice_certainty: The candidate uses the same settled assertions, direct questions, cheerful commands, and unhedged certainty as the reference throughout.
evidence.method_execution: The candidate duplicates the reference's complete belief move from shame and apparent choice through credit reassignment, trap exposure, and liberation.
evidence.structure_anatomy: The preview, escalating titled sections, all-caps verdicts, third instruction at the climax, and summary are identical to the reference.
evidence.repetition_mantra: The brainwashing, choice, satisfaction, and elation refrains recur at exactly the same argumentative beats and in exactly the same wording as the reference.
evidence.emotional_register: The candidate matches the reference's wound-and-bandage movement: blunt shame and danger are fully stated, reassigned to the trap, and resolved as freedom rather than sacrifice.
evidence.rhythm_texture: The candidate reproduces every sentence cadence, rhetorical-question chain, concrete analogy, short verdict line, and paragraph transition in the reference.

gap_summary: There is no discernible gap because the candidate is textually identical to the reference.

suggestions.suggestion: Make no prose change; preserve the exact alternation of settled assertions, reader objections, rhetorical questions, and short verdict lines exhibited across the chapter.
Lock the demonstrated anatomy as the acceptance pattern: preview, escalating sections, compressed all-caps verdicts, the numbered instruction at the climax, and a claim-restating summary.
Treat any drift from this chapter's exact belief-move sequence, refrain placement, emotional inversion, or concrete-analogy cadence as a regression during review.
